calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-31-2016 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-17-2016 Continued To May-31-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Noel Bouey in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that everything looks to be in good shape, that the next phase will be more difficult and asked if Mr. Bouey would have assistance in the future. Mr. Bouey stated that he will have help along the way. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was granted (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Murillo. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-20-2015 Continued To Jun-03-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
